body_en: We are thrilled to announce the opening of our new Rika Dojo! Situated in the natural beauty of Iwami Town, Tottori Prefecture — close to the Geopark Uradome Coast and Iwai Hot Spring — the dojo offers a truly exceptional training environment. Inside, only the sound of wind-moved trees and the rustle of training uniforms echo in the stillness. It is a space designed for focusing the mind and deepening your practice. We warmly welcome karate practitioners of all levels, including complete beginners and children from age 4. Come experience the art of karate in this serene setting.
body_jp: 新しいRika道場が開設されました！場所は鳥取県岩美町。ジオパーク浦富海岸や岩井温泉にほど近い、自然豊かな環境に位置しています。道場内は静まり返る空間の中で、風で揺れる木々の音と道着の音だけが響き渡ります。心を整え、技を磨くのに最適な場所です。初心者の方や4歳からのお子様も大歓迎です。ぜひこの静かな環境で空手を体験してください。
